title: Daily Training
tickModelDone: Today's training has already run. Changes to focus or intensity now take effect at the next training (tomorrow). Form and fatigue update only at the daily training, not continuously.
disabledNote: Daily training starts at the relaunch. Training programs can be set up now.
recoveryNoteTitle: Do riders get energy back every day?
recoveryNote: Yes. Every night around midnight each rider recovers some fatigue, so it never gets stuck at 100. Rest and easy days recover the most; normal training settles at a sustainable level; hard training still builds fatigue up over the day. A high Recovery rating speeds it up.
focusGuideIntro: Each focus develops these abilities faster. Your other abilities keep improving a little more slowly, so riders develop across the board, just fastest in the chosen direction.
focusGuideIntensity: Intensity sets the pace: Easy is safe, Normal is the balanced default (small setback risk), Hard is fastest (clear risk of a setback or injury when fatigue is high).
noRiders: No riders on your squad yet.
bulkPartial: Updated {applied} of {total}. {failed} could not be saved. Try again in a moment.
historySubtitle: Your last 30 days of daily training
historyEmpty: No training runs yet. Once daily training is live, each day's run will be logged here.
riderHistorySubtitle: This rider's daily training over the last 30 days
riderHistoryEmpty: No training history for this rider yet.
